notes: Full 5-stage orchestrated pipeline executed end-to-end. All numeric claims in main.tex trace directly to the experimental log (MCAR/MAR ranges, 2,453 true DEGs, 95.6-98.5% vs 56.6-90.7%, 382/575/214 DEGs, etc.). Figures 2-4 were produced from verbatim log values via uv run python; Figure 1 is a schematic. No \input{} directives; intro, methods, results, discussion are embedded in a single main.tex with unified voice. Discussion contains 6 substantive paragraphs. Citations: 24 verified BibTeX entries, multiple with PMIDs from PubMed search.
